analysis.consistency: The spell adheres to standard D&D 5e formatting and structure. All required fields (name, level, school, casting_time, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present and populated logically.
analysis.quality: High quality. The description is clear, and the scaling mechanism ('At Higher Levels') is standard and well-defined. The exclusion clause for undead and constructs is standard for healing spells.

mechanics.effect: Restores 1d4 + modifier in HP to a visible creature within range. Ineffective against Undead/Constructs.

scaling.mechanism: Increases healing dice per slot level above 1st.

mechanics.balance_notes: As a bonus action, this spell is highly efficient for emergency battlefield healing, especially since it doesn't require line of sight to the target, only vision, and has a long range. The low initial healing output (1d4+mod) balances the action economy advantage.
